metadata.description: A marketplace of composable AI skills covering the full software delivery lifecycle — from requirements and design through implementation, testing, and review. Each plugin targets a specific SDLC role: backend engineers, frontend engineers, QA, business analysts, and more.

plugins.name: lattice
plugins.description: Composable skills for backend engineers: design-first workflows, clean architecture, DDD, secure coding guardrails, test quality, and structured code review.
